funcbody:
func encodeWord(charset, s string) string {
	buf := getBuffer()

	buf.WriteString("=?")
	buf.WriteString(charset)
	buf.WriteByte('?')
	buf.WriteByte('q')
	buf.WriteByte('?')

	enc := make([]byte, 3)
	for i := 0; i < len(s); i++ {
		b := s[i]
		switch {
		case b == ' ':
			buf.WriteByte('_')
		case b <= '~' && b >= '!' && b != '=' && b != '?' && b != '_':
			buf.WriteByte(b)
		default:
			enc[0] = '='
			enc[1] = upperhex[b>>4]
			enc[2] = upperhex[b&0x0f]
			buf.Write(enc)
		}
	}
	buf.WriteString("?=")

	es := buf.String()
	putBuffer(buf)
	return es
}
